requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 230 V / 50 Hz / Type G Plug (SLSI / IEC 62368-1)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——230V / 50Hz / G型插头（SLSI / IEC 62368-1）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——230V / 50Hz / G型插頭（SLSI / IEC 62368-1）

summary.en: Sri Lanka operates on 230 V / 50 Hz mains supply. The standard plug and socket type is Type G (BS 1363, British 3-pin square-pin, used in modern installations); Type D (BS 546) appears in older installations. Mains-powered wireless and IoT devices must comply with applicable SLSI/SLS electrical safety standards aligned with IEC 62368-1 (audio/video and IT equipment safety) or IEC 60950-1 for legacy scoped products. Testing at CISIR or an overseas IEC-accredited lab is the typical route. SLSI may certify compliance; TRCSL type approval submission typically includes safety test evidence.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡使用230V/50Hz市电供应。标准插头和插座类型为G型（BS 1363，英式三方脚，用于现代装置）；旧装置中可见D型（BS 546）。市电供电的无线及物联网设备须符合适用的SLSI/SLS电气安全标准，与IEC 62368-1（音视频及IT设备安全）或旧范围产品的IEC 60950-1对齐。通常在CISIR或海外IEC认可实验室进行测试。SLSI可认证合规；TRCSL型式认可申请通常须包含安全测试证明。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡使用230V/50Hz市電供應。標準插頭和插座類型為G型（BS 1363，英式三方腳，用於現代裝置）；舊裝置中可見D型（BS 546）。市電供電的無線及物聯網裝置須符合適用的SLSI/SLS電氣安全標準，與IEC 62368-1（音視頻及IT設備安全）或舊範圍產品的IEC 60950-1對齊。通常在CISIR或海外IEC認可實驗室進行測試。SLSI可認證合規；TRCSL型式認可申請通常須包含安全測試證明。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1: Audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — Safety requirements
BS 1363 / Type G plug and socket standard

summary.en: China uses 220 V / 50 Hz with Type A/I plugs (GB 2099 / GB 1002). Electrical safety for IT and audio/video equipment is covered by GB 4943.1 (aligned with IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1), enforced under the CCC (3C) mandatory certification scheme. Chinese plug types (Type A/I) are not compatible with Sri Lanka Type G sockets; plug adaptation required.
summary.zh: 中国使用220V/50Hz，A/I型插头（GB 2099 / GB 1002）。IT及音视频设备电气安全由GB 4943.1（与IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1对齐）覆盖，在CCC（3C）强制认证体系下执行。中国插头类型（A/I型）与斯里兰卡G型插座不兼容，须进行插头适配。
summary.zht: 中國使用220V/50Hz，A/I型插頭（GB 2099 / GB 1002）。IT及音視頻設備電氣安全由GB 4943.1（與IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1對齊）覆蓋，在CCC（3C）強制認證體系下執行。中國插頭類型（A/I型）與斯里蘭卡G型插座不相容，須進行插頭適配。

gap.en: Significant gap: voltage is similar (220 V CN vs 230 V LK, within IEC tolerance), but frequency is the same (50 Hz). Plug type differs (A/I in CN vs G in LK) — product must ship with or be adapted to Type G plug. CCC is not recognised by SLSI; separate IEC 62368-1 test report from accredited lab and SLSI/SLS safety compliance required.
gap.zh: 较大差距：电压相近（中国220V vs 斯里兰卡230V，在IEC容差范围内），频率相同（50Hz）。插头类型不同（中国A/I型 vs 斯里兰卡G型）——产品须随附或适配为G型插头。CCC不被SLSI认可；须另行提供来自认可实验室的IEC 62368-1测试报告及SLSI/SLS安全合规证明。
gap.zht: 較大差距：電壓相近（中國220V vs 斯里蘭卡230V，在IEC容差範圍內），頻率相同（50Hz）。插頭類型不同（中國A/I型 vs 斯里蘭卡G型）——產品須隨附或適配為G型插頭。CCC不被SLSI認可；須另行提供來自認可實驗室的IEC 62368-1測試報告及SLSI/SLS安全合規證明。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 certification does not satisfy SLSI/SLS electrical safety requirements for Sri Lanka. An IEC 62368-1 compliant test report from an accredited lab is required. Product plug type must be adapted to Type G (BS 1363) for Sri Lanka. Voltage (230 V) and frequency (50 Hz) adaptation should be verified on mains-powered devices.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC / GB 4943.1认证不满足斯里兰卡SLSI/SLS电气安全要求。须提供来自认可实验室的IEC 62368-1合规测试报告。产品插头类型须适配为斯里兰卡G型（BS 1363）。市电供电设备须核验电压（230V）和频率（50Hz）适配性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC / GB 4943.1認證不滿足斯里蘭卡SLSI/SLS電氣安全要求。須提供來自認可實驗室的IEC 62368-1合規測試報告。產品插頭類型須適配為斯里蘭卡G型（BS 1363）。市電供電裝置須核驗電壓（230V）和頻率（50Hz）適配性。
